questions.question: Which of the following signals will have a left-sided ROC for their Laplace transform?

explanations.a: $u(-t)$ is left-sided, so its Laplace transform has a left-sided ROC.

questions.question: Select the correct statement from below for the system function $X(s) = \frac{(s + 1)}{(s - 1)}$

answers.c: system can be both causal & stable

explanations.a: The system can be causal depending on the ROC.

questions.question: A system function is of the form $H(s) = \frac{(s-a)}{(s-b)}$, where $a$ is not equal to $b$ and they are real numbers. This system can be both stable and causal if

explanations.d: For stability and causality, all poles should be less than zero. Thus, $b < 0$ is required.
